title: Contracting Information for Suppliers - Canada.ca
content:
## Contracting information for suppliers
Appendices B, C and D comprise the Terms of payment (B), Statement of work (C) and (if applicable) any Additional clauses (D). These appendices are available during an actual contracting process.
- Appendix E - General conditions
- Appendix F - Supplementary conditions
- Additional instructions (applicable to bid solicitation)
- Intellectual Property rights conditions (Appendix A) Crown to own the intellectual property Crown to own the intellectual property - Alternative background licence (broader) and optional clauses: Broader licence to the intellectual property rights in the contractor's background information. Contractor to own the intellectual property: Contractor to own intellectual property rights in foreground information. Contractor to own the intellectual property: Alternative background licence (broader) and optional clauses: Broader licence to the intellectual property rights in the background information (contractor owns)
- Crown to own the intellectual property
- Crown to own the intellectual property - Alternative background licence (broader) and optional clauses: Broader licence to the intellectual property rights in the contractor's background information.
- Contractor to own the intellectual property: Contractor to own intellectual property rights in foreground information.
- Contractor to own the intellectual property: Alternative background licence (broader) and optional clauses: Broader licence to the intellectual property rights in the background information (contractor owns)
For more information, visit Doing Business with ESDC .
